text.title: vision-classification-moderation Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for vision-classification-moderation as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Running both the VLM classification and a second purpose-built moderation API (e.g., OpenAI Moderation) on every image to "double check".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Duplicates API cost with minimal accuracy gain on non-borderline content. Reserve dual-pass only for images the VLM flags as low-severity — the high-volume safe-image path should be single-pass.
